things.name: St Stephen's Cathedral
things.description: Gothic masterpiece and heart of Vienna with the iconic mosaic tile roof

things.name: Schonbrunn Palace & Gardens
things.description: Habsburg summer palace with 1,441 rooms, formal gardens and the Gloriette

things.name: Vienna State Opera
things.description: One of the world's leading opera houses with lavish tours and standing-room tickets

things.name: Belvedere Palace
things.description: Baroque palace complex housing Klimt's The Kiss and Austrian art from the Middle Ages

things.name: Hofburg Palace
things.description: Former imperial residence of the Habsburg dynasty with Sisi Museum and Spanish Riding School

things.name: Kunsthistorisches Museum
things.description: Art History Museum with one of the world's finest collections of Old Masters

things.name: Prater & Riesenrad
things.description: Historic amusement park with the 1897 giant Ferris wheel offering city panoramas

things.name: Naschmarkt
things.description: Vienna's most popular open-air market with over 120 stalls of produce and restaurants

things.name: Ringstrasse
things.description: Emperor Franz Joseph's magnificent 19th-century boulevard lined with monumental buildings

things.name: Vienna Coffee Houses
things.description: UNESCO-listed Viennese coffeehouse culture at historic Café Central, Landtmann or Schwarzenberg
